data.content:
### Start Next.js Development Server

Source: https://github.com/openai/agents.md/blob/main/AGENTS.md

Starts the Next.js development server with Hot Module Replacement (HMR) enabled. This command should be used for all interactive development within agent sessions to ensure live code updates.

```bash
npm run dev
```

```bash
pnpm dev
```

```bash
yarn dev
```

--------------------------------

### Package Manager Commands

Source: https://github.com/openai/agents.md/blob/main/README.md

Provides examples of using pnpm for various development tasks within the project, such as navigating to packages, installing dependencies, creating new packages, running tests, and linting.

```bash
pnpm dlx turbo run where <project_name>
```

```bash
pnpm install --filter <project_name>
```

```bash
pnpm create vite@latest <project_name> -- --template react-ts
```

```bash
pnpm turbo run test --filter <project_name>
```

```bash
pnpm test
```

```bash
pnpm vitest run -t "<test name>"
```

```bash
pnpm lint --filter <project_name>
```

--------------------------------

### Run ESLint Checks

Source: https://github.com/openai/agents.md/blob/main/AGENTS.md

Executes ESLint to check for code style and potential errors according to the project's linting rules. This is a standard command for maintaining code quality.

```bash
npm run lint
```

--------------------------------

### Install Dependencies

Source: https://github.com/openai/agents.md/blob/main/README.md

Installs the necessary dependencies for the project. This is a prerequisite for running the development server.

```bash
npm install
```

--------------------------------

### Run Production Build (Avoid during agent sessions)

Source: https://github.com/openai/agents.md/blob/main/AGENTS.md

Generates production-ready assets for the Next.js application. This command should NOT be run inside an agent session as it disables hot-reloading and can lead to an inconsistent development server state.

```bash
npm run build
```

--------------------------------

### Start Development Server

Source: https://github.com/openai/agents.md/blob/main/README.md

Starts the local development server for the Next.js website. This command should be run after installing dependencies.

```bash
npm run dev
```

--------------------------------

### Execute Test Suite

Source: https://github.com/openai/agents.md/blob/main/AGENTS.md

Runs the project's test suite to verify the functionality of components and utilities. This command is essential for ensuring the stability and correctness of the application.

```bash
npm run test
```

=== COMPLETE CONTENT === This response contains all available snippets from this library. No additional content exists. Do not make further requests.
